name: claude-project-tracker
description: Raul's Claude Code plugin collection — project management and more

plugins.name: project-tracker
plugins.description: Local project management with YAML indexes, per-project tracking files, learning mode, and optional Todoist integration

plugins.name: review-cpp
plugins.description: C++ code review using 10 parallel specialized agents covering architecture, modern C++, performance, memory safety, concurrency, security, testing, and more
